_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Node.js Generic
author: parker@parkervcp.com
description:
Generic Node.js egg.

Clones a Git repository during install. Defaults to the master branch if none is specified.

Installs node_modules automatically. If user_upload is enabled, manual project management is expected.
startup: npm install npm@latest; if [[ -d .git ]] && [[ {{AUTO_UPDATE}} == "1" ]]; then git pull; fi; if [[ ! -z ${NODE_PACKAGES} ]]; then /usr/local/bin/npm install ${NODE_PACKAGES}; fi; if [[ ! -z ${UNNODE_PACKAGES} ]]; then /usr/local/bin/npm uninstall ${UNNODE_PACKAGES}; fi; if [ -f /home/container/package.json ]; then /usr/local/bin/npm install; fi; if [[ "${MAIN_FILE}" == "*.js" ]]; then /usr/local/bin/node "/home/container/${MAIN_FILE}" ${NODE_ARGS}; else /usr/local/bin/ts-node --esm "/home/container/${MAIN_FILE}" ${NODE_ARGS}; fi

installation.script:
set -euo pipefail

echo "[INFO] Starting Node.js environment setup..."

# System Dependencies
export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

apt update -y
apt install -y --no-install-recommends \
    git \
    curl \
    jq \
    file \
    unzip \
    make \
    gcc \
    g++ \
    python3 \
    python3-dev \
    python3-pip \
    libtool

rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Update npm
echo "[INFO] Updating npm..."
npm install -g npm@latest

# Prepare Server Directory
mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

# User Upload Mode
if [[ "${USER_UPLOAD:-}" == "true" || "${USER_UPLOAD:-}" == "1" ]]; then
    echo "[INFO] USER_UPLOAD enabled. Skipping repository setup."
    exit 0
fi

# Validate Git Address
if [[ -z "${GIT_ADDRESS:-}" ]]; then
    echo "[ERROR] GIT_ADDRESS is not set."
    exit 1
fi

# Ensure .git suffix
if [[ "${GIT_ADDRESS}" != *.git ]]; then
    GIT_ADDRESS="${GIT_ADDRESS}.git"
fi

# Authenticated Git Access (optional)
if [[ -n "${USERNAME:-}" && -n "${ACCESS_TOKEN:-}" ]]; then
    echo "[INFO] Using authenticated Git access."
    GIT_ADDRESS="https://${USERNAME}:${ACCESS_TOKEN}@$(echo "${GIT_ADDRESS}" | cut -d/ -f3-)"
else
    echo "[INFO] Using anonymous Git access."
fi

# Clone or Update Repository
if [[ -n "$(ls -A /mnt/server 2>/dev/null)" ]]; then
    echo "[INFO] /mnt/server is not empty."

    if [[ -d .git && -f .git/config ]]; then
        ORIGIN="$(git config --get remote.origin.url || true)"

        if [[ "${ORIGIN}" == "${GIT_ADDRESS}" ]]; then
            echo "[INFO] Pulling latest changes..."
            git pull --ff-only
        else
            echo "[WARN] Existing repo origin does not match. Skipping pull."
        fi
    else
        echo "[WARN] Files exist but no valid git repo found. Aborting to prevent damage."
        exit 10
    fi
else
    echo "[INFO] Cloning repository..."

    if [[ -z "${BRANCH:-}" ]]; then
        git clone "${GIT_ADDRESS}" .
    else
        git clone --single-branch --branch "${BRANCH}" "${GIT_ADDRESS}" .
    fi
fi

# Install Additional Node Packages
if [[ -n "${NODE_PACKAGES:-}" ]]; then
    echo "[INFO] Installing extra Node packages..."
    npm install ${NODE_PACKAGES}
fi

# Install Project Dependencies
if [[ -f package.json ]]; then
    echo "[INFO] Installing production dependencies..."
    npm install --production
else
    echo "[WARN] No package.json found. Skipping npm install."
fi

echo "[SUCCESS] Installation complete."
exit 0

variables.name: Git Repo Address
variables.description:
GitHub Repo to clone

I.E. https://github.com/parkervcp/repo_name

variables.name: User Uploaded Files
variables.description:
Skip all the install stuff if you are letting a user upload files.

0 = false (default)
1 = true

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Pull the latest files on startup when using a GitHub repo.

variables.name: Additional Node packages
variables.description:
Install additional node packages.

Use spaces to separate.

variables.name: Git Access Token
variables.description:
Password to use with git.

It's best practice to use a Personal Access Token.
https://github.com/settings/tokens
https://gitlab.com/-/profile/personal_access_tokens

variables.name: Uninstall Node packages
variables.description:
Uninstall node packages.

Use spaces to separate.

variables.name: Main file
variables.description:
The file that starts the app.
Can be .js and .ts

variables.name: Additional Arguments.
variables.description: Any extra arguments for nodejs or ts-node
